zh.lifeSummary: John Morteyn是Eustace de Morteyn和Eincina Ruffus的兒子，於1233年出生。他於大約1245年與Constance Merston在英國貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1284年在英國貝德福爾阿普爾享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Morteyn是Eustace de Morteyn和Eincina Ruffus的儿子，于1233年出生。他于大约1245年与Constance Merston在英国貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1284年在英国貝德福爾阿普爾享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Morteyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortagne in La Manche, France. This surname has probably been confused with   Morton  .

variants.name: Morton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of the many places called Mor(e)ton, named with Old English mōr ‘moor’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. There has probably been some confusion with Morten , and perhaps also with Murton . This English name has also been established in Ireland since the 13th century.
American shortened and altered form of Swedish Mårtensson or Mortensson (see Martenson and Mortenson ), which could also be substituted for the Finnish cognate Marttinen.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: John Morteyn was born in 1233 as the son of Eustace de Morteyn and Eincina Ruffus. He married Constance Merston about 1245, in Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1284, in Ampthill, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: John Morteyn est né en 1233, fils d’Eustace de Morteyn et Eincina Ruffus. Il a épousé Constance Merston environ 1245, à Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1284, à Ampthill, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: John Morteyn wurde 1233, als Sohn von Eustace de Morteyn und Eincina Ruffus geboren. Er hat um 1245 in Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England Constance Merston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1284 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Ampthill, Bedfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: John Morteyn è nato il nel 1233 come figlio di Eustace de Morteyn e Eincina Ruffus. Lui sposato Constance Merston circa 1245, nel Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1284, nel Ampthill, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Morteynは1233年にEustace de MorteynとEincina Ruffusの息子として生まれた。約1245年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティルスウオルスでConstance Merstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1284年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアアンプスイルで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Morteyn(은)는 1233년 Eustace de Morteyn(와)과 Eincina Ruffus의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1245년 영국 베드퍼드실르 틸스워스에서 Constance Merston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1284년 영국 베드퍼드실르 아프스이에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Morteyn nasceu em 1233 filho de Eustace de Morteyn e Eincina Ruffus. Ele casou-se com Constance Merston aproximadamente 1245, em Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1284, em Ampthill, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: John Morteyn родился в 1233 г. Его родителей звали Eustace de Morteyn и Eincina Ruffus. Он женился на женщине по имени Constance Merston около 1245 г. в местности тилсворт, бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1284 г. в местности амптилл, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: John Morteyn nació en 1233 como hijo de Eustace de Morteyn y Eincina Ruffus. Se casó con Constance Merston aproximadamente 1245, en Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1284, en Ampthill, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
